text: In order to comply with safety policies and procedures, ship crew and officers must:

options.text: Minimize the use of alcohol on board
Focus on delivering ship and cargo at all costs
Stop unsafe practices which may cause accidents, injury, or environmental pollution

explanation: Safety policies require that all personnel actively stop unsafe practices. This is a core component of the safety management system, ensuring that risks are mitigated before they manifest as injury, damage, or pollution.
